name: @dev-hann/opencode-bridge
description: OpenClaw plugin that delegates ALL code work to OpenCode. Dispatches tasks via HTTP API, injects collaboration rules, manages server lifecycle.
author: dev-hann

scripts.plugin:build: npm run build && openclaw plugins build --entry ./dist/index.js
scripts.plugin:validate: npm run build && openclaw plugins validate --entry ./dist/index.js
